lifecycleScripts.afterStart: npx wp-env run cli composer install --working-dir=/var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/bricks-mcp && npx wp-env run tests-cli composer install --working-dir=/var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/bricks-mcp && npx wp-env run cli wp plugin activate bricks-mcp && npx wp-env run cli wp rewrite structure '/%postname%/'
